description: Frozen corpus promoting named-workset, sparse-slice, and policy-limited-view scope truth to beta on the support / audit export surface. Each case proves a support/audit export declares the active named workset / sparse scope / policy-limited view it was produced under (an embedded scope declaration that itself validates and quotes the active scope class, workset name, and lineage), discloses out-of-scope roots and policy-hidden members through the scope truth's excluded_roots instead of silently dropping them, and labels policy-limited content with the support redaction vocabulary (policy_locked / omitted_policy_locked / policy_denied) rather than silently embedding it. scope_class_vocabulary_map pins the mapping between the support scope-class tokens and the aureline-workspace ScopeClass vocabulary; the export surface reuses the workspace vocabulary verbatim, so the map is the identity over the shared classes and support_only_scope_classes is empty. workspace_scope_class_vocabulary mirrors aureline-workspace ScopeClass::as_str(); redaction_vocabulary mirrors the policy-locked tokens from aureline-support bundle::vocabulary. ci/check_beta_support_workset_scope.py re-derives both vocabularies from crate source and fails closed if either drifts.
